content: Offline-first PWA build order: (1) data layer first — schema, types, migrations, service functions — all other layers depend on this; (2) routing shell — page scaffolding, navigation, HashRouter — lets feature work be tested in isolation; (3) shared UI primitives — design system tokens, layout components, FAB, bottom sheet; (4) features in dependency order — onboarding (creates the child profile that dashboard reads), then dashboard, then add-word flow, then list views, then detail/edit pages, then report/export; (5) PWA/SW config last — can only be verified once the app shell is stable.
